title: Need deveoper verification for macos
body: Im unable to use podman executable in company provided macbook, and i coudnt allow it under System Preferences > Security & Privacy > Allow apps from etc. Please let me know if this can be sorted in upcoming releases

comments.body:
if you cannot trust the application this is a problem your it department needs to address. it does run just fine on a personal mac.

how did you get it, homebrew?

Hi @robbiemu 

I directly downloaded from releases and tried to execute them, Brew do-sent play with well with our internet.
Its works fine on my personal mac as well (I granted access from system preferences), Just facing this weird issue in my office mac.
@baude @ashley-cui PTAL I tought the mac release was signed by us?
I think we signed a few of the previous releases manually but haven't done signing in CI yet.
What version of Podman is this please?
can this be sorted next release ?
We are just releaseing podman 4.1 @baude @mheon @ashley-cui Can we sign it?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Signed the .dmg! And added it as an asset in the release.
Hello All, Just downloaded from the latest release and the issue still remains, Am i missing anything here ?
@psadi Every release needs to be signed manually, let me sign 4.1.1 today
